scripts:
set properties on /content/dam/claude-demo-site/jcr:content
  set cq:conf{String} to /conf/claude-demo-site
  set jcr:title{String} to "Claude Demo Site"
end
create service user stock-service-user with path system/claude-demo-site

set ACL for stock-service-user
  allow jcr:read on /content/claude-demo-site
  allow jcr:read on home(stock-service-user)
end
